Choose Your Plan

All plans include access to the SD Accelerate platform. Upgrade or cancel anytime.

or $1000/year (save $200)

$175/month

or $1750/year (save $350)

$300/month

or $3000/year (save $600)

Take your social media to the next level. Dedicated team support, proactive strategies, and ongoing optimization — we drive your digital impact.

  • ✓Dedicated account manager
  • ✓Proactive content creation
  • ✓Ongoing profile optimization

  • ✓Weekly reporting
  • ✓Direct team communication
